vocab.meaning: làm cho sạch đẹp, chỉnh trang lại
vocab.example: The local council really needs to spruce up the abandoned lot downtown and turn it into a vibrant community garden.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng không gian, tạo thêm cơ hội tiếp cận
vocab.example: Opening up more green belts near residential areas would significantly improve the air quality and aesthetic of our neighborhood.
I've noticed several small pocket parks springing up lately, which provides a lovely escape from the concrete jungle.

vocab.meaning: phục vụ cho nhu cầu của một nhóm đối tượng cụ thể
vocab.example: I’d love to see more public squares that cater to the elderly, providing them with safe spaces to socialize and exercise.

vocab.meaning: dành riêng ra (đất đai, ngân sách) cho một mục đích
vocab.example: The government should set aside more land for communal recreation instead of constantly approving high-rise developments.

vocab.meaning: tập trung lại xung quanh một khu vực
vocab.example: Public amenities tend to cluster around the city center, leaving those of us in the outskirts feeling a bit neglected.

vocab.meaning: làm mới, thay đổi diện mạo cho bớt nhàm chán
vocab.example: Adding some modern art installations would definitely freshen up the dull pedestrian walkways in my area.

vocab.meaning: dọn dẹp sạch sẽ (những thứ không cần thiết)
vocab.example: If they cleared away the debris from the old factory site, it could be repurposed as a fantastic public sports complex.

vocab.meaning: hòa hợp với môi trường xung quanh
vocab.example: New public benches and shelters should blend in with the natural landscape rather than looking like eyesores.

vocab.meaning: kết nối mọi người, tạo sự gắn kết
vocab.example: Well-maintained public spaces are essential because they bring together people from all walks of life.
